title: [MooreToCore] LSB and MSB support in moore dialect

features.name: packed array with non-zero LSB
features.description: Code should include a packed array declaration with non-zero LSB (e.g., input [4:3] a) where the LSB index is not 0

features.name: absolute index access to packed array
features.description: Code should include an absolute index access to a packed array element (e.g., a[3]) where the index equals the LSB of the range

features.name: edge detection on multi-bit signal
features.description: Code should include an edge detection event on a multi-bit signal (always @(posedge a)) where the signal has multiple bits
